revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Angel (Tekken) | Guid=3005-3506 | Deck=In the Tekken series, alternate version of Devil. Her aim is to save Kazuya's soul from the Devil. | Gender=Non-Binary | Concepts=Concepts/Bowling,Concepts/Electric_Wind_Godfist | Enemies= | Franchises=Franchises/Tekken,Franchises/Tekken_Tag_Tournament | Friends=Characters/Jun_Kazama,Characters/Kazuya_Mishima | Games=Games/CR_Tekken,Games/Pachi_Slot_Tekken_3rd,Games/Tekken_2,Games/Tekken_5,Games/Tekken_Hybrid,Games/Tekken_Pachi_Slot_3rd,Games/Tekken_R,Games/Tekken_Tag_Tournament,Games/Tekken_Tag_Tournament_2 | Locations=Locations/Heaven | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/9778/2217358-tekken_angel.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"2217358-tekken_angel.jpg","path":"0\/9778\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_mini,scale_small,square_small,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_super,screen_kubrick,scale_tiny","caption":""},"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Angel was introduced in [[Games/Tekken_2|Tekken 2]]. She fought to save [[Characters/Kazuya_Mishima|Kazuya]]'s soul from the [[Concepts/Devil_Gene|Devil Gene]] but was unsuccessful. She shares the same moves as the [[Devil|Devil]] in Tekken 2 and [[Games/Tekken_Tag_Tournament|Tekken Tag Tournament]].
==Tekken 2== Although Kazuya is seemingly possessed with a black heart, there is still some good left in him. Angel will battle against Devil so that she may have Kazuya's soul.
'''Ending:''' Angel is sitting on top of a building during the night. She jumps off into the mist-like fog down below. As she falls, she sees all the fighters in the Tournament, from Heihachi to Devil. What looks like the x-rays of bones are shown, and then Devil being surrounded by several angels. The image fades away and Angel is shown forming a ball of light in her hand.
==Tekken Tag Tournament== Angel is a playable character in ''Tekken Tag Tournament''. However, ''Tekken Tag Tournament'' is not a part of the''Tekken'' series' canonical storyline. This is Angel's last appearance as a playable character so far.
'''Ending:''' Angel stands next to Devil, who is laying on the ground. She crouches and touches his head. Devil transforms into Kazuya (the screen goes white during this transformation). A closeup of Angel smiling is shown. Kazuya regains consciousness, and rises slightly. Angel is nowhere to be seen. This ending takes place in Unknown's stage.
==Trivia== * To unlock her and Devil, you must beat Arcade Mode using Kazuya. She's selected pressing one of the kick buttons while selecting Devil. * Angel is the final boss if you play as Devil. * Angel's sub-bosses are Heihachi Mishima (Stage 8) and Jun Kazama (Stage 9). * In the Arcade version of Tekken 2, Angel is called Devil when you select her and when you fight in a match with her. She is also mute when fighting, with the exception of when she is defeated; her knock-out sound is simply Kazuya's. * To unlock her and Devil, you must beat Arcade Mode with 13 different characters. She's selected pressing the Start button while selecting Devil. * Angel's ending is almost identical to Jun Kazama's ending in the same game, which led many fans to erroneously believe that the two characters are one and the same, despite Namco stating that Tekken Tag Tournament is non-canonical. * In ''Tekken Tag Tournament'', all Jack robots (Prototype Jack, Jack-2, and Gun Jack) will go haywire if Devil's or Angel's laser strikes them. * It's unknown what happened to Angel since she was not seen after Tekken 2.

{{Character | Name=Armstrong | Guid=3005-58849 | Deck=A supervillain affiliated with Shroud's Red Ring organization. Having vestigial arms, he compensates by using a mechanical harness that includes two large robotic arms. Hates Invisigal and takes an immediate dislike to Robert. | Concepts=Concepts/Cyborg,Concepts/Organized_Crime,Concepts/Overweight_Character,Concepts/Supervillain | Enemies=Characters/Blonde_Blazer,Characters/Coupe,Characters/Flambae,Characters/Golem_58781,Characters/Invisigal,Characters/Malevola,Characters/Phenomaman,Characters/Prism,Characters/Punch_Up,Characters/Robert_Robertson_III,Characters/Sonar,Characters/Waterboy | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Shroud_58847,Characters/Toxic | Games=Games/Dispatch | Locations=Locations/California | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3828165-armstrong.jpg}}

Having vestigial arms, he compensates by using a mechanical harness that includes two large robotic arms. Hates Invisigal and takes an immediate dislike to Robert.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Aurora | Guid=3005-9972 | Deck=One of the main characters from Black Sigil. Kairu's best friend. | Gender=Non-Binary | Concepts=Concepts/Black_Magic,Concepts/Magic,Concepts/White_Magic | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Isa,Characters/Kairu,Characters/Nephi,Characters/Nym,Characters/Rogurd | Games=Games/Black_Sigil_Blade_of_the_Exiled | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Whip | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/112/935605-aurora.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"935605-aurora.jpg","path":"0\/112\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,square_tiny,square_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_small,square_mini,scale_medium,scale_avatar,scale_super,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> Aurora is the daughter of Duke Averay and was raised alongside Kairu. She's the hot-headed type that tends to act without thinking first, and although Kairu is more level-headed and prudent, they still managed to become best friends and have been on many adventures together, usually at Aurora's bidding. In battle she is a powerful wizard and wields the element of fire as her main weapon, which she can use not only to fry enemies, but to heal allies as well. She's also able to wield a whip, which, although weak, is able to strike enemies from a distance. Aurora isn't quite built for armor and has to stick to lighter clothing and magical barriers.

{{Character | Name=Bartholomew Ogbeche | Guid=3005-58660 | Deck=Bartholomew Owogbalor Ogbeche (born 1 October 1984) is a Nigerian former professional footballer who played as a striker. | Birthday=1984-10-01 | Concepts=Concepts/Al_Jazira_Club,Concepts/Cadiz_CF,Concepts/Deportivo_Alaves,Concepts/Kavala_F_C,Concepts/Kerala_Blasters_FC,Concepts/Middlesbrough_F_C,Concepts/Mumbai_City_FC,Concepts/NFF_10291,Concepts/Paris_Saint_Germain,Concepts/Real_Valladolid,Concepts/SC_Cambuur,Concepts/Soccer_Player,Concepts/Willem_II_Tilburg,Concepts/Xerez_CD | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games=Games/FIFA_10,Games/FIFA_11,Games/FIFA_12,Games/FIFA_15,Games/FIFA_16,Games/FIFA_17,Games/FIFA_18,Games/FIFA_22,Games/FIFA_23,Games/FIFA_Soccer_06,Games/FIFA_Soccer_07,Games/FIFA_Soccer_08,Games/FIFA_Soccer_09,Games/FIFA_Soccer_13,Games/FIFA_Soccer_2005 | Locations=Locations/Nigeria | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3813636-6294218821-images.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3813636-6294218821-images.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Bartholomew Owogbalor Ogbeche (born 1 October 1984) is a Nigerian former professional footballer who played as a striker.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Benjamin | Guid=3005-24535 | Deck=The protagonist of Final Fantasy: Mystic Quest. An adventurous but naive youth. The player can choose to name him whatever they wish, though his default name is Benjamin. | Gender=Male | Concepts=Concepts/Male_Protagonists,Concepts/New_Protagonist_in_Sequel | Enemies= | Franchises=Franchises/Final_Fantasy | Friends=Characters/Kaeli,Characters/Phoebe_24538,Characters/Reuben,Characters/Tristam | Games=Games/Final_Fantasy_Mystic_Quest,Games/Theatrhythm_Final_Bar_Line,Games/Theatrhythm_Final_Fantasy_Curtain_Call | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/2/23093/2340364-benjamin.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"2340364-benjamin.jpg","path":"2\/23093\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,scale_small,square_mini,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_super,screen_kubrick","caption":"BENJAMIN"},"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Benjamin is the protagonist of Final Fantasy Mystic Quest and the only character avaiable for the entire game. Selected early on by The Mysterious Old Man as the "Chosen One" while fleeing from the destruction of his hometown, Benjamin is tasked with visiting each of the four regions of the world and defeating the elemental dark lords.
Benjamin's personality is that of a youth clearly in over his head, but is steadfast and determined enough to see his quest through to the end. The player gets a sense of his naivety with how readily he trusts people (including the mercurial Tristam) and comments about how his allowance is "only 2gp a month".
As the hero, Benjamin can use all available spells and four unique weapon types, each with their own upgraded variants: The Sword, the Axe, the Bombs and the Claw. Besides his starting sword, he is given the first level of the other three weapons by other characters (Kaeli, Tristam and Phoebe). The upgraded versions are either found in dungeons, won in battlefields or bought in stores. The exceptions are the grenades (given by Reuben) and the Dragon Claw (given by Tristam).
At the end of the game, after defeating the Dark King, Benjamin decides he is not yet done with adventures and sets off in Captain Mac's ship to parts unknown (unwittingly bringing Tristam along with him).

{{Character |Guid=3005-58770 |Name=Blonde Blazer |Aliases=Mandy |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3821240-blonde-blazer-is-shroud-in-disguise-v0-ze2z1znbcrxf1.jpg |Deck=A friendly and optimistic superhero who is involved with the Superhero Dispatch Network (SDN). She recruits the player character Robert into the organization and can be romanced by him. |RealName=Mandy |Gender=Female |Concepts=Concepts/Flight, Concepts/Love, Concepts/Potential_Love_Interest, Concepts/Romance, Concepts/Super_Strength, Concepts/Superhero, Concepts/Transformation |Enemies=Characters/Armstrong, Characters/Coupe, Characters/Shroud_58847 |Friends=Characters/Chase_58771, Characters/Coupe, Characters/Flambae, Characters/Golem_58781, Characters/Invisigal, Characters/Malevola, Characters/Phenomaman, Characters/Prism, Characters/Punch_Up, Characters/Robert_Robertson_III, Characters/Sonar, Characters/Waterboy |Games=Games/Dispatch |Locations=Locations/California |Objects=Objects/Boots, Objects/Cape, Objects/Dress, Objects/Gloves, Objects/Jewel, Objects/Mask, Objects/Opera_Gloves, Objects/Spandex, Objects/Thigh_High_Boots }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3821240-blonde-blazer-is-shroud-in-disguise-v0-ze2z1znbcrxf1.jpg","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,square_medium,square_tiny,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A friendly and optimistic superhero who is involved with the Superhero Dispatch Network (SDN). She recruits the player character Robert into the organization and can be romanced by him.
